'''Omman''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Description==
Omman was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] located in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] along the [[Desevran Trace]]. Omman's agricultural production made it a competitor of neighboring [[Folende]], another agriworld.<ref name="Xim Week" />

==History==
Omman became the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison after the [[Declaration of a New Order]]. The Empire used the planet as a base from which it could keep watch on the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] and monitor [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity in the troubled [[Back Spiral]] region of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Omman was introduced in the novel''[[When the Domino Falls]]'', placed near [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]].<ref name="WtDF">{{JournalCite|3|When the Domino Falls}}</ref> But after another "Omman" was mentioned in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]],<ref name="Xim Week" /> the first was identified as [[Omman Minor]] by the [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Although it was published later, ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' did not notice this [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
